name: Woolgather
short_description: Woolgather is a survival horror where sheep hunt wolves. Explore the dark forest, repair broken generators, manage hunger, and gather supplies. Hide from crazed sheep herds, uncover the mystery of this place, and try to escape before they get you.
detailed_description:
Woolgather

Sheep hunt wolves. Welcome to the forest where everything is turned upside down.

You are a wolf trapped in a mysterious forest. Here the natural order is broken: harmless sheep have turned into ruthless predators, and you have become their prey. Your goal is to survive, repair all the generators, and find a way out before the herd of crazed sheep gets to you.

This is not just a forest. This place holds a dark secret. With each generator started, reality around you distorts. Can you uncover the truth and escape?

Gameplay

Survival in the wild forest
Watch your hunger meter — look for food, gather supplies scattered throughout the locations. A hungry wolf is a slow wolf. And a slow wolf is easy prey.

Generators — the key to freedom
Broken generators are hidden across the map. To start them, you'll need spare parts and time. But be careful: noise attracts the sheep.

Herds of crazed sheep
Sheep don't graze here — they hunt. They chase you in packs, corner you, and give you no rest. Use your paws to fight them off.

Inventory and items
Collect useful things: food, medkits, energy drinks. Every item can save your life.

Game Features

✔ Unique concept — survival horror where the roles of predator and prey are reversed
✔ Atmospheric forest — dark locations, dynamic lighting and sounds that chill your blood
✔ Hunger system — monitor the wolf's condition, search for food and supplies
✔ Generators as a goal — repair equipment to open the path to salvation
✔ Dangerous enemies — sheep act in packs
✔ Mysterious story — the forest holds a secret waiting to be uncovered

Story

You wake up in an unfamiliar forest. All you care about is the feeling of hunger. Now you are a wolf, but something is wrong. The sheep that should fear you are somehow hunting you instead.

The forest whispers. The sheep watch. The generators hum. With every step you get closer to the answer — but are you ready to learn the truth?

Who is this game for?

Woolgather is created for fans of:

  • Atmospheric horror with a unique concept

  • Survival games

  • Unconventional stories and unexpected twists

  • Tense gameplay where the enemy is always one step behind
